title: AcidificationFactor
description: AcidificationFactor: Single value indicator for Acidification, measured in moles of H+ (per EN 15804+A2, this was previously measured in SO2 per EN 15804+A1), it refers to compounds that contribute to acid rain.

Value.description: Value for this single factor indicator. Property has a quantity of type AcidificationPerQuantity measured in [mol H+ eq per unit].

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
